cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20.0)

# Pull in the Zephyr build system
find_package(Zephyr REQUIRED HINTS $ENV{ZEPHYR_BASE})

project(oled_custom_font)

# Include the character framebuffer CMake tools
include(${ZEPHYR_BASE}/cmake/cfb.cmake NO_POLICY_SCOPE)

# Export compile commands for clangd (Neovim)
set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)

target_sources(app PRIVATE src/main.c src/display_hal.c)

# Define the output directory for the header file generated by the TTF file
set(gen_dir ${ZEPHYR_BINARY_DIR}/include/generated)

# Generate the font header
# Syntax: target | input_file | output_file | width | height
generate_cfb_font_for_target(app fonts/silkscreen.ttf ${gen_dir}/cfb_font_9x16.h 9 16)
